channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: ‘SNL’: Watch Noah Kahan Perform ‘The Great Divide,’ ‘Doors’
item.description: 🎤🔥 Get ready to groove with Noah Kahan on SNL! 🕺🎶 #NoahKahan #SNL #LiveMusic

item.title: Aitana Kicks Off Her Cuarto Azul World Tour With Intimate, Emotional Show: Full Setlist
item.description: 🎤✨ Aitana pours her heart out on stage! Dive into the emotional journey with her full setlist from the Cuarto Azul World Tour. 🎶💙 #Aitana #CuartoAzulTour

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers Debuts New Music at First Show in Three Years
item.description: Phoebe Bridgers is back and better than ever! 🌟🎶 Fresh tunes at her first show in 3 years. Let's groove! #PhoebeIsBack

item.title: Janet Jackson’s ‘Rhythm Nation’ Inducted Into Grammy Hall of Fame: It ‘Fights Bigotry and Promotes Understanding’
item.description: 🎶 Let's groove to the iconic beats of Janet Jackson's 'Rhythm Nation' now a Grammy Hall of Fame legend! 🌟 #MusicHistory #JanetJackson

item.title: Björk Plays Surprise DJ Set At Venice Biennale, Promises New Album Next Year
item.description: 🎶 Björk takes over Venice with a surprise DJ set! 🌟 New album coming our way in 2022! 🎧 #Björk #MusicNews
